message:
feat: implement genome pruning for memories and routing rules

Add confidence-decay pruning for memories (MemoryStore.pruneByConfidence)
and usage-based pruning for routing rules (Genome.pruneUnusedRoutingRules).
Both operations commit to the genome git repo only when items are removed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
